summary: Tested Transfer Selection Modal redesign in TripBuilder.jsx. All 8 features tested and working correctly: modal opens for arrival/departure, search filter, category sidebar, time filters, transfer card display, vehicle selection modal, close button, and modal header with city/date.
critical_code_review_comments: Transfer Modal correctly implements categories sidebar with 'All Options' and dynamic transfer_type categories
Time filter buttons (All, Morning, Afternoon, Evening) properly filter transfers by pickup_times field
Search filter correctly filters transfers by title and description
Transfer card displays all required info: title, description, pickup times (Starts), duration, price, and Select button
Clicking Select opens VehicleSelectionModal with vehicle options and pricing
Modal header correctly shows city name and date (e.g., 'Add Arrival in Tbilisi (Day 1: Fri, 10 Apr 2026)')
Close button works correctly to dismiss the modal
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing: transfer-modal-search, transfer-cat-*, transfer-time-*, transfer-option-*, select-transfer-*
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Tbilisi transfer data (1 transfer available)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Transfer Selection Modal redesign is complete and working. Modal opens from Day 1 (arrival) via [data-testid='select-arrival-transfer'] and last day (departure) via [data-testid='select-departure-transfer']. Categories sidebar shows 'All Options' and 'Private'. Time filters work but note: the single Tbilisi transfer has '24 Hours' pickup time which shows under 'Evening' filter (hour >= 17 or < 5). Search filters by title/description. Clicking Select opens VehicleSelectionModal with vehicle options (4 Seater Sedan AED 80, 7 Seater Car AED 119). Close button works via JS click.

features_tested.transfer_modal_opens_arrival: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Select Transfer' on Day 1
features_tested.transfer_modal_opens_departure: PASS - Modal opens when clicking 'Select Transfer' on last day (departure)
features_tested.search_filter: PASS - Filters transfers by title and description
features_tested.category_sidebar: PASS - Shows 'All Options' and 'Private' categories, filters by transfer_type
features_tested.time_filter_buttons: PASS - All, Morning, Afternoon, Evening buttons visible and clickable
features_tested.time_filter_logic: PASS - Morning (5-12), Afternoon (12-17), Evening (17+ or <5) filtering works
features_tested.transfer_card_display: PASS - Shows title, description, pickup times (Starts), duration, price, Select button
features_tested.select_opens_vehicle_modal: PASS - Clicking Select opens Vehicle Selection Modal with vehicle options
features_tested.close_button: PASS - Close button dismisses the modal

arrival_transfer.title: One-way transfer from Tbilisi airport to Tbilisi center - Private from Shota Rustaveli Tbilisi International Airport
arrival_transfer.price: AED 0 (base), AED 80 (4 Seater Sedan), AED 119 (7 Seater Car)

departure_transfer.title: One-way transfer from Tbilisi center - Tbilisi Airport - Private to Shota Rustaveli Tbilisi International Airport
